meta.title: We aimed our tracking telescope at #SpaceX's #Starship... here's what we saw
meta.description:
Song: "Cryo" by Everyday Astronaut

Here’s what we captured with our tracking telescope for #Starship #flight3! We’re using a 8” Meade scope on a Ross VR600 mount and a RED Komodo-X. See the full mega cut on our YouTube channel. @CosmicPerspective  #spacex #ift3
